description: Run cargo check, cargo test, and cargo clippy -- -D warnings after completing dsrs-ohh.11 to ensure ADR changes keep the workspace green.
title: Phase 10 verification: cargo check/test/clippy

description: [DSRs: crates/rlm-derive/src/generators/properties.rs] Generate filter properties (e.g., user_steps from steps where source=="user") and flatten properties (e.g., all_tool_calls from nested Option<Vec<ToolCall>>).

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 1.6): implement filter/flatten property generators in `crates/rlm-derive/src/generators/properties.rs`.
- Filter: `filter_property`, `filter_value`, `filter_field` on a field emits method returning filtered Vec.
- Flatten: `flatten_property` (+ optional `flatten_parent`) flattens nested Vec/Option<Vec>.
Helpers to detect Option/Vec and innermost Vec type.

title: Task 1.6: Implement filter and flatten properties
